frozen_center.break: Body-cross predicates exactly as source_semantics.known_from_current_description; closed bars only.

day_flat.provisional_description_only: Close at New York day end; no timestamp or ordering is invented.

frozen_center.reference: Immediately preceding complete 06:00-to-06:00 Europe/Rome session high and low; no Asia/London/NY sub-session ranges.
frozen_center.signal_to_fill: A qualifying retest is decided only after the M5 bar closes. The conservative offline market proxy fills once at the next M5 bar open: LONG at Ask=open+spread, SHORT at Bid=open. No close-bar fill or price improvement.
variant_notes: max_trades=1 and pyramiding=0 are the explicitly requested safety-restricted center even though the published inputs permit other values.
No parameter, symbol, side, year, or spread selection is permitted after outcomes.

merit.reason: Exact source semantics are unavailable; no outcome was computed.

predeclared_joint_merit_gate.decision: MERIT only if every center and spread-8 condition passes; otherwise NO_MERIT. A source blocker yields NOT_ADJUDICATED, never FAIL or MERIT.
predeclared_joint_merit_gate.familywise_note: This is one frozen variant with a conjunctive intersection gate across all predeclared symbol/year/side/spread cells; no best-cell selection is allowed. The gate is deliberately stricter but is not a statistical FWER guarantee. If inferential p-values are added later, every simultaneous cell/hypothesis must be preregistered and Holm-Bonferroni adjusted at family alpha 0.05; none are computed here.

required_next_action: Recover and hash the exact Pine revision named ICT_Session_Breakout_Published.pine.
Resolve every blocker against executable Pine lines.
Create and commit a new pre-outcome contract/analysis_id before any data read.

blocking_ambiguities.reason: The description says optional flat at New York day end but does not define the exact timestamp, timezone transition implementation, bar on which close_all executes, or precedence versus same-bar SL/TP.
The description names a 5-pip inside level and says tolerance is a band for reentry plus retest wick, but does not expose the exact high/low/close inequalities or inclusive endpoints.
The description does not prove whether reentry, minimum-bar maturation, and retest may transition on one bar or which event has precedence.
The description does not prove whether the break bar, first post-break bar, or reentry bar is bar zero for min-bars-after-break.
The reset is described but its precedence against same-bar reentry/retest and an already-armed same-side setup is not visible.

Without Pine, strategy process_orders_on_close/calc_on_order_fills settings and therefore exact TradingView order timing cannot be verified. This contract's conservative next-bar proxy is explicit but cannot be claimed source-identical.

source_preflight.unblock_requirement: Archive the exact Pine revision behind the publication, hash it, and map every blocker to executable lines. A description, screenshot, reconstructed clone, or a different EA is insufficient.
